TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qutux_byacing, title = qutux_byacing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qutux_byacing} }

S.FORM: qutux byacing (1月) byacing hiya' ga lpgan na ryax qaniy hya. lpgan na 'tayal sraral hya' ga, magal squ psbahan aring hmbku' byacing ruw mtbalay byacing ruw mucing sa mpuzyut lawziy qu sinxalan lmpuw na 'tayal. knita' na 'tayal squ qutux byacing hya' ga, nanak yaquw hmbku' byacing, mtbalay byacing, mpuzyut byacing cyugal qaniy quw pspngan na 'tayal hiya'. Hmbku' byacing hmbku' byacing mrkyas byacing smka'byacing mtbalay byacing qaniy hya' ga yasa quw mtunaw balay quw byacing sawn niya' qaniy hya', qaniy hya' lga aki' yasa quw ryax balay na tay mawpuq zmagal ini' gat ay mawpuw mtzyu' ryax lpgan na Thayluw. mpuyut byacing mnqlih byacing mnhibaw byacing mpuzyut byacing Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Hitaypayan .

qutux byacing (1月) byacing hiya' ga lpgan na ryax qaniy hya. lpgan na 'tayal sraral hya' ga, magal squ psbahan aring hmbku' byacing ruw mtbalay byacing ruw mucing sa mpuzyut lawziy qu sinxalan lmpuw na 'tayal. knita' na 'tayal squ qutux byacing hya' ga, nanak yaquw hmbku' byacing, mtbalay byacing, mpuzyut byacing cyugal qaniy quw pspngan na 'tayal hiya'. Hmbku' byacing hmbku' byacing mrkyas byacing smka'byacing mtbalay byacing qaniy hya' ga yasa quw mtunaw balay quw byacing sawn niya' qaniy hya', qaniy hya' lga aki' yasa quw ryax balay na tay mawpuq zmagal ini' gat ay mawpuw mtzyu' ryax lpgan na Thayluw. mpuyut byacing mnqlih byacing mnhibaw byacing mpuzyut byacing Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Hitaypayan .
S.PHON: qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ (**) βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħijaʔ ɣa lpɣan na rjax qanij ħja. lpɣan na ʔtajal s~ɕraral ħjaʔ ɣa, maɣal s~ɕqu ps~ɕβaħan ariŋ ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ruw mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ruw muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕa mpuzjut lawzij qu s~ɕinxalan lmpuw na ʔtajal. knitaʔ na ʔtajal s~ɕqu qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa, nanak jaquw ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, mpuzjut βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal qanij quw ps~ɕpŋan na ʔtajal ħijaʔ. ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mrkjas~ɕ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕmkaʔβjaʦ~ʨiŋ mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qanij ħjaʔ ɣa jas~ɕa quw mtunaw βalaj quw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn nijaʔ qanij ħjaʔ, qanij ħjaʔ lɣa akiʔ jas~ɕa quw rjax βalaj na taj mawpuq zmaɣal iniʔ ɣat aj mawpuw mtzjuʔ rjax lpɣan na tħajluw. mpujut βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mnqliħ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mnħiβaw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpuzjut βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ħitajpajan .
